actions.text: The Comhairle nan Eilean Siar has elected a new leader.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Former Aberdeen midfielder Jamie Reid has signed for Sutton United.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The defender has been ruled out for 12 weeks with a hamstring injury.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police are searching for an older child who threatened a younger child with a weapon.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The leader of the DUP outlined the party's position during a speech on Monday night.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Carl Frampton won his semi-final bout at the European Boxing Championships on Sunday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The 26-year-old midfielder has signed for Hull City from Angers.

actions.text: Le Havre, Clermont and Olympique de Valence

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 49-year-old man was found dead at a flat in West London.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The organisers of the Loopallu Festival have announced that the 2017 event will be held on the town's pier.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: On Monday morning, zookeepers found one Humboldt penguin dead in its cage and two others missing.
